message.printing_all: Printing all events and properties to the Minecraft log...
message.full_server_support: Detected full server support for Ambience Mini! All server-dependent features are enabled.
message.partial_server_support: Detected partial server support for Ambience Mini! Some server-dependent features are enabled.
message.outdated_version_on_server: Ambience Mini version on server is too old! All server-dependent features are disabled.
message.no_server_support: No server support for Ambience Mini! All server-dependent features are disabled.
message.area_invalid_location: Cannot extend or contract the area to this location.
message.area_look_at_destination: Please look at the point you would like to extend or constrict the area to.
message.area_cannot_edit: You cannot edit areas owned by other players.
message.area_name_cannot_blank: The area name must contain non-blank symbols.
message.player_crashed: Music player crashed! Press '%s' to reload Ambience Mini. See logs for details.
message.unhandled_message: Received an unknown type of message from server! This should not happen, see server logs.
message.unhandled_client_message: The server could not handle a message from the client! This should not happen, see server logs.
message.message_caused_server_error: A message from this client caused an error on the server! This should not happen, see server logs.
